sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 13.36 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.13)

statement.latex: For a finitely generated pro-$p 0.2ex$-group$G$set$a_n(G)={ dim}_{\,{ F}_p}I^n/I^{n+1}$, where$I$is the augmentation ideal of the group ring${ F}_p[[G]]$. We define the growth\/ of$G$to be the growth of the sequence$\{ a_n(G)\} _{n { N}}$. [r]{a)} If the growth of$G$is exponential, does it follow that$G$contains a free pro-$p 0.2ex$-sub\-group of rank 2? [r]{c)} Do there exist pro-$p 0.2ex$-groups...
